How It Works

Get expert care in 4 simple steps

1

Choose Specialist

Browse verified doctors by specialty and availability

2

Book Your Slot

Select a date and time that works for your schedule

3

Join Video Call

Connect securely from any device, anywhere in the world

4

Get Your Plan

Receive a personalised care plan and follow-up support

Patient Stories

“Dr. Patel completely transformed my sleep. Within 3 weeks of following her plan, I was sleeping 7+ hours straight. Life-changing.”

Sleep Medicine Patient

“I was skeptical about virtual consultations but Dr. Johnson was incredibly thorough and empathetic. I finally feel heard and have a real plan.”

Mental Health Patient

“Aisha’s nutrition plan was practical and delicious. I lost 8kg in 2 months without feeling deprived. The recipes she recommended are amazing.”

Nutrition Patient

Frequently Asked Questions

After booking, you’ll receive a secure link to join the video call at your scheduled time. No downloads required — just a browser and stable internet.
Yes. Every specialist on Aura Wellness is fully licensed, board-certified in their specialty, and verified through our rigorous credential check process.
Some specialists can prescribe where legally permitted. Your doctor will advise on this during your consultation. Check local regulations for your region.
You can reschedule up to 4 hours before your appointment at no charge. Same-day cancellations may incur a small fee.
Absolutely. All consultations and health data are protected under HIPAA and our strict privacy policy. Your information is never shared without your consent.

Get Wellness Updates

Tips from our specialists, delivered weekly.

⭐ Review
